label: Backstory trait
description: A trait and degree pair used in forcedTraits and disallowedTraits (BackstoryDef) and in traits (CreepJoinerBenefitDef). Loaded from keyed child elements via LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the TraitDef defName, text is the integer degree (defaults to 0 when omitted).

def.label: Trait
def.description: TraitDef that is forced onto or disallowed for the pawn.

degree.label: Degree
degree.description: Specific trait degree. Defaults to 0 when the child element has no text content.
